name: ocas-elephas
description: Long-term knowledge graph (Chronicle) maintenance. Use when the system needs to query world knowledge, ingest structured signals from journals, resolve entity identity, consolidate candidates into confirmed facts, or generate pattern-based inferences. Trigger phrases: 'what does Chronicle know about', 'run a consolidation pass', 'resolve these duplicate entities'. Do not use for social graph queries (Weave) or web research (Sift).
author: Indigo Karasu
